name: Amulet of Exalted Dexterity
description: History Added in the Exalt Version 5.0.0.0 (July 2024) update.
effects: Insight Amulet: Creates effects when worn with MotMG 2024 equipment. Weapons: The weapon fires 2 extra projectiles with 80% range, dealing 55-75 damage and Multihit. Armours: Applies Energized condition for 8 seconds on hit, 20 seconds cooldown.
